meaning: n.贾克斯(一译杰奎斯,莎士比亚喜剧<<皆大欢喜>>
examples: The Social Contract by Jean Jaques Rousseau - (Download PDF or EXE).
The term 'midlife crisis' was thought up by psychologist Elliot Jaques in 1965.
Only 45 years ago Elliott Jaques thought that the midlife crisis started around age 35.
Jaques kept a diary of what she wore to work during the first week of February, 2012.
In his second Test, Jaques hit 66 before miscuing a sweep off spinner Mohammad Rafique to mid-wicket.
